nasb.text: Everyone who falls on that stone will be broken to pieces; but on whomever it falls, it will scatter him like dust.”

esv.text: Everyone who falls on that stone will be broken to pieces, and when it falls     on anyone, it will crush him.”

cnv.text: 凡是跌在那石頭上的，就必摔碎；那石頭掉在誰的身上，就必把他壓得粉碎。”

ccb.text: 凡跌在这石头上的人，将粉身碎骨；这石头落在谁身上，将把谁砸烂。”

csbs.text: 所有跌落在那石头上的，就将被破碎；那石头落在谁的身上，就会把谁砸得稀烂。”
